hero.location: In the heart of Costa Calma, Fuerteventura
hero.description: Hand-stretched dough, San Marzano tomatoes, fior di latte mozzarella.
hero.slogan: Life is too short to eat bad pizza!

about.label: OUR STORY
about.heading: A Passion for Authentic Pizza
about.body: At L'AperiPizza, every pizza is a work of art. Since opening in Costa Calma, we've dedicated ourselves to bringing authentic Italian flavors to Fuerteventura. Our dough is prepared daily with selected ingredients, and each pizza is baked in our traditional oven to perfection.
about.feature1_desc: Pizza baked in a wood-fired oven at 485°C for a perfect crust
about.feature2_desc: Selected ingredients imported directly from Italy
about.feature3_desc: Traditional Neapolitan recipes passed down with passion

menu.label: OUR MENU
menu.heading: Discover Our Flavours
menu.slogan: Life is too short to eat bad pizza!
menu.note_base: All pizzas include tomato and mozzarella

reservations.label: RESERVATIONS
reservations.heading: Book Your Table
reservations.body: Secure your spot at L'AperiPizza. For groups larger than 8 people, contact us directly via WhatsApp.
reservations.form_whatsapp_note: WhatsApp will open with your booking details
reservations.success_body: Your booking is on its way. Complete it in WhatsApp.
reservations.wa_greeting: Hello! I would like to make a reservation at L'AperiPizza
